name: multi-rag-harness-codex
description: Codex workflows and MCP configuration for local multi-rag-harness memory.

interface.shortDescription: Local RAG and durable memory workflows for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adds a local multi-rag-harness MCP server plus a Codex skill for deciding when to search, inspect sources, and persist durable trace, decision, failure, and tool memory.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use multi-rag-harness memory to search prior context and store durable project learning.
